name: Wired On-Ear Headphones with 4' Cable - heyday™ Black
description:
You'll be ready for anything from work calls to gaming sessions to just listening to your favorite tunes with Wired On-Ear Headphones from heyday™. These wired headphones fit over your head with an adjustable headband and cushioned ear coverings for comfortable wear, even for extended periods. The headphones are compatible with any device with a 3.5mm aux port, giving you the option to use with your phone, tablet or computer, and they have a four-foot cable so you have a some flexibility to move about.

heyday™: Let your style speak volumes.
